name: Industrial Safety Helmet
shortDescription: Ratchet-adjust hard hat with optional chin strap and accessory slots.
longDescription: A HDPE shell hard hat with a ratchet harness for quick, secure adjustment across a shift. Universal accessory slots accept earmuffs and visors so one helmet covers multiple risk profiles. Available in a range of colours for role or contractor colour-coding across a site.

images.alt: Industrial Safety Helmet supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
